title: Service Engineer (Troubleshoot / Machines / 5 Days)
description:
• Well Established Security Screening Company

• Salary: $3200 - $4200 + $300 Allowance

• Working hour: 8.30am – 5.30pm (Monday - Friday)

• Working Location: Islandwide

• Variable bonus + Excellent Wellfare


Job Scope:

  • Plan and perform maintenance for equipment and facilities.
  • Diagnose and fix technical issues (mechanical, electrical, electronic).
  • Implement preventive/predictive maintenance programs.
  • Collaborate with production, quality, and safety teams.
  • Maintain maintenance records and reports.
  • Support installation and upgrades of systems.
  • Identify and implement process and cost improvements.

Requirement:

  • Diploma in IT Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, or related field
  • 2–3 years of experience in maintenance or technical roles in manufacturing/industrial settings

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume:

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
